title: MGN 471 (M) Amendment 2: Maritime Labour Convention, 2006, definitions
body: "This notice should be read with the UK regulations implementing the provisions of the Maritime Labour Convention, 2006, as amended (MLC).  Notice to:   shipowners masters seafarers recruitment and placement services   The purpose of the marine guidance notice is to explain the UK’s understanding of the key terms used in the MLC.  The UK intends to implement the MLC and all amendments fully and without departing from the intention of those who drafted the convention.  The terms covered in this notice are “seafarer,” “ship” and “shipowner.”  Amendment 2 updates the definition of seafarer to cover special purpose ships. "
